imageAlt: iOS 18 updates roadmap item preview image
title: iOS 18 updates
summaryBody: We need to update iPad UX due to changes that will be enforced by Apple by April 2025. Otherwise our iPad version will break. Foundational work progressing & majority to be done involving full team (to some extent at least) in C1 and C2.
detailBody: We need to update iPad UX due to changes that will be enforced by Apple by April 2025. Otherwise our iPad version will break. Foundational work progressing & majority to be done involving full team (to some extent at least) in C1 and C2.
